note: Scoped-file artifact manifest for paper reproducibility. File hashes and byte counts are authoritative for the working tree at generated_utc.
git_head_semantics: Records HEAD when this manifest was generated. If the manifest is committed, this value necessarily points to the commit before the final manifest commit; use file hashes for artifact identity.
working_tree_status_semantics: Status is an audit snapshot only and may include manuscript, table, PDF, or manifest-refresh changes intentionally present during generation.
file_hash_semantics: Each listed sha256 and byte count is computed from the working-tree file content at generation time. The manifest file itself is excluded.
